subcodes.first_line: O thou Furughi, upon thee be God's salutations and peace on the day thou wast born, and on the day thou didst pass away, and on the day thou shalt be raised up alive [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا حضرت فروغی علیک صلوات الله و سلامه یوم ولدت و یوم توفیت و یوم بعثت حیا تا
subcodes.subjects: @imagery in the Qur'an, @interpretation of dreams and visions, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
